zh.lifeSummary: 當Julianna de Corbet於大約1405年出生在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特時，她的父親Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET23歲，母親Margaret Mallory14歲。她於大約1423年與John de Sandford I在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1501年在英國史洛普爾享年97歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Julianna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anna  , perhaps sometimes intended as a form of   Juliana .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Julianna de Corbet was born about 1405, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, her father, Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET, was 23 and her mother, Margaret Mallory, was 14. She married John de Sandford I about 1423, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1501, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 97.

Elle a épousé John de Sandford I environ 1423, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1501, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 97 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Julianna de Corbetが約1405年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで生まれた時，父Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBETは23歳，母Margaret Malloryは14歳であった。約1423年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでJohn de Sandford Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1501年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Julianna de Corbet(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Mallory(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1423년 영국 슈럽실르에서 John de Sandford I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1501년 영국 슈럽실르에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julianna de Corbet родилась около 1405 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mallory, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Sandford I около 1423 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1501 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 97 лет.
